topic: Admin Dashboard - Pagination, Dashboard Table & Security Fix

changes.description: Added full pagination to test records page (RecordsView). Now supports 10/20/50/100 rows per page with MUI TablePagination. Shows total count (e.g., '共 7114 条').
Added test type filter dropdown (全部/女M/男M/S型/LGBT+) to RecordsView. Filter resets page to 0 and re-queries with the selected type.

Dashboard 'recent test records' table was a permanent empty placeholder (hardcoded '暂无最近测试记录'). Now loads and renders the 5 most recent records with type chips, user names, timestamps, and detail buttons.
Removed plaintext admin credentials hint ('默认管理员账户：adam / Sangok#3') from the AdminApp.jsx login page. Replaced with neutral 'M-Profile Lab 管理后台' text.
Rewrote loadTestResults to accept explicit (filters, page, rowsPerPage) params to avoid stale closure issues. Added handlePageChange, handleRowsPerPageChange, handleFilterChange helpers.

validation.syntaxCheck: Balanced braces/parens/brackets verified via Node.js script
validation.devServer: Vite dev server started successfully on port 3000
validation.browserVerification: Browser subagent verified: login works, dashboard shows 5 recent records, records page shows 7114 total records with pagination (1-20/共7114条) and type filter dropdown

knownLimitations: Hardcoded admin credentials still exist in ModernAdminApp.jsx (line 305) and adminApi.js (line 242) - requires backend auth migration to fully fix
N+1 user nickname query pattern still present in getAllTestResults - optimize to batch .in() query in future
Security and Settings tabs still show placeholder content
